chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ مِنَ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي التَّعَرُّضِ لِلرِّزْقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – What is Obligated from the emulating the Imams<sup>asws</sup> regarding the vulnerability of the livelihood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/20)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/20)
text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ بِيَدِهِ مِسْحَاةٌ وَ عَلَيْهِ إِزَارٌ غَلِيظٌ يَعْمَلُ فِي حَائِطٍ لَهُ وَ الْعَرَقُ يَتَصَابُّ عَنْ ظَهْرِهِ فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَعْطِنِي أَكْفِكَ فَقَالَ لِي إِنِّي أُحِبُّ أَنْ يَتَأَذَّى الرَّجُلُ بِحَرِّ الشَّمْسِ فِي طَلَبِ الْمَعِيشَةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Al Qasim Bin Suleyman, from Jameel Bin Salih, from Abu Amro Al Shaybani who said,

‘I saw Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and in his<sup>asws</sup> hand was a shovel, and upon him<sup>asws</sup> was a coarse trouser, working in a wall of his<sup>asws</sup>, and the sweat was running from his<sup>asws</sup> back. So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Give it to me, I shall suffice for you<sup>asws</sup>’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> love it that the man should be hurt by the heat of the sun in seeking the livelihood’.
en.sarwar: 13. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn ‘Abd Allah from his father from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad ibn Sulayman who has said that narrated to him Jamil ibn Salih from abu ‘Amr al-Shaybaniy who has said the following: “I once saw abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, with a shovel in his hand wearing a very thick dress working inside his walls and his back drenched in perspiration. I then asked, I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, allow me to help you.’ He said to me, ‘I Love that man endures hardships in the hot sun to make a living.”
